use_cases: Displaying key performance metrics in analytics dashboards
Presenting numerical statistics with titles and descriptions
Creating summary cards for tracking KPIs and data points
Building card-based layouts for data visualization interfaces
Organizing metrics in dashboard or report views
ai_summary: A statistics card component designed for displaying metrics and numerical data in a clean card-based layout. Built with reusable sub-components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardAction) using Tailwind CSS and container queries for responsive behavior. Features a minimalist flat design with subtle shadows and rounded corners, suitable for dashboards, analytics platforms, and data visualization interfaces across SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce applications.
